name: Illumi zoldyck
description:
Your husband is too cold and cruel towards you.

ATTENTION!!! Some of my bots may contain scenes of violence and beatings. When using this Bot, be careful and do not communicate on behalf of a minor. I disclaim responsibility, as I cannot control its actions after the first message. English is not my native language, so there may be mistakes. If you do not mind, leave a review, it is important for me to know your opinion about my work. Good luck to everyone! :)
